hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgh pr merge\b'; then branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent 2>/dev/null; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git checkout main && git pull --quiet; if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ] && [ "$branch" != "master" ]; then git branch -d "$branch" 2>/dev/null || git branch -D "$branch"; echo "Cleaned up local branch: $branch"; fi; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent 2>/dev/null; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$file" --log-level silent 2>/dev/null; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(node|npm|npx|expo)\b'; then echo "$input" | jq --arg prefix 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && ' '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", updatedInput: (.tool_input + {command: ($prefix + .tool_input.command)})}}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgh pr create\b'; then source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent 2>/dev/null; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; echo '--- Preflight: ts:check ---'; npm run ts:check; TS=$?; echo '--- Preflight: lint:check ---'; npm run lint:check; LINT=$?; echo '--- Preflight: test ---'; npm test -- --passWithNoTests; TEST=$?; if [ $TS -ne 0 ] || [ $LINT -ne 0 ] || [ $TEST -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Preflight checks failed. Fix the errors above before raising a PR.'; exit 2; fi; fi
